features.name: UI/UX Test Suite

features.notes: tests/ui_changelog.py; 20 render_* components tracked

features.name: Living Requirements Tracker
features.notes: tests/requirements_tracker.py — scan, --status, --bug, --fix, --complete, --dry-run. SPEC 38/39 added.

features.name: Portfolio Actions Panel
features.notes: render_portfolio_actions(): HOLD/WATCH/TRIM/EXIT per open position from ensemble score + sell score; Dashboard tab above market intelligence row

features.name: Position Sizing Recommendation
features.notes: render_position_sizing(): conviction-based target allocation (3-12%) from ensemble score; Portfolio tab above positions table

features.name: Today's Actions Summary
features.notes: render_todays_actions(): today BUY/SELL timeline with time, price, P&L, reason; Dashboard tab between hero and whats_changed

features.name: AI Investment Committee
features.notes: render_ai_committee(): XGBoost/LSTM/Sentiment vote chips per open position with majority verdict; Dashboard tab right column above watchlist

features.name: Symbol Detail Action Card
features.notes: Enhancement to render_symbol_detail(): action card (HOLD/WATCH/TRIM/EXIT), conviction bar, sizing guidance injected at top of detail card

features.name: Recommendation Engine
features.notes: bot/core/recommendation_engine.py — 5 shared helpers implemented and tested: get_portfolio_action, get_position_sizing, get_sell_analysis, get_recommendation_explanation, get_portfolio_health. Single source of truth for all panels.

features.name: Portfolio Health Hero Panel
features.notes: render_portfolio_health_hero() — replaces render_dashboard_hero() in Dashboard tab. 5-component health score (Risk/Diversification/Cash/Momentum/Quality) + grade (A/B+/B/C/D) + biggest risk callout.

features.name: Today's Actions Panel v2
features.notes: render_todays_actions() rebuilt — sorted action list (EXIT/SELL/TRIM/ADD/BUY/WATCH/HOLD) with sizing hint from get_position_sizing(). Calls get_portfolio_action() per position.

features.name: Sell Analysis Panel
features.notes: render_sell_analysis() — sell score 0-100 table with HOLD/WATCH/TRIM/SELL/EXIT signal, P&L, weight, top reason, trim action. Portfolio tab. Calls get_sell_analysis().

features.name: Why Panel
features.notes: Why panel embedded in render_symbol_detail() — action badge + conviction bar + bullish/bearish factors from get_recommendation_explanation() + sizing from get_position_sizing().

features.name: Position Sizing Panel v2
features.notes: render_position_sizing_panel() — current→target weight with dual-bar visualisation, delta $+shares. Portfolio tab. Replaces render_position_sizing().

features.name: Design System v1.0
features.notes: Permanent design system: 4 font sizes (36/20/15/11px), 3 text colors, 7 action colors with bg fills, 13 component helpers (_card/_label/_hero_value/_section_title/_action_badge/_symbol/_confidence_bar/_metric_row/_progress_bar/_divider/_empty_state/_action_row/_table), mobile CSS (390px), GROUP 7 compliance test (0 FAIL). docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md is single source of truth.

features.name: Positions Table Redesign
features.notes: render_positions() columns changed to Symbol|Action|Weight|Target|Confidence|P&L. Removed: Shares, Invested, Current Value, Cost Basis. Action from recommendation engine. Visual hierarchy by urgency (EXIT/SELL red row, TRIM amber, BUY green, HOLD dimmed).

features.name: Tab Navigation Visibility Fix
features.notes: Fixed tab visibility on HuggingFace Spaces: (1) triple CSS selectors with TEXT1 at 0.6 opacity (inactive) and 1.0 (active/hover), ACTION_BUY green underline on selected; (2) custom gr.themes.Base().set() theme replacing bare gr.themes.Base(); (3) JS MutationObserver fallback that enforces white text on all tab buttons and updates on class change.

features.name: HOLD Visual Fix
features.notes: Fix HOLD/WATCH rows in _action_row(): change sym_color from TEXT2 (#b0b7c3) to TEXT1 (#ffffff) so symbol is always readable. ACTION_HOLD badge (#64b5f6) already correct — only the row symbol text needs fixing.

features.name: Badge Standardization Audit
features.notes: Audit all render_* functions: replace any inline badge HTML (inline-block span with BUY/SELL/HOLD/TRIM/EXIT text) with _action_badge() calls. All _badge() shim calls already delegate to _action_badge(). Target: zero inline badge HTML in any render function.

features.name: Empty State Standardization Audit
features.notes: Audit all render_* functions: replace custom empty state HTML (f-strings with 'No open positions', 'No trades', 'No signal', 'No data', etc.) with _empty_state(icon, title, subtitle) calls. Target: zero custom empty state HTML in any render function.

features.name: Decision Center Panel
features.notes: render_decision_center(): consolidates render_portfolio_actions + render_sell_analysis + render_position_sizing_panel into one unified panel. Per-position row: action badge + sell_score/100 + current%→target% + dollar amount + top reasons (✗/✓). Sorted EXIT→SELL→TRIM→ADD/BUY→WATCH→HOLD. Goes in Portfolio tab. Old render_portfolio_actions/sell_analysis/position_sizing_panel become dead (called only from decision_center).

features.name: Rebalance Panel
features.notes: render_rebalance(): new panel. Current vs Target allocation table with delta column + action badge. Cash row shows direction change. Summary footer: net $ to rebalance, cash after, sector risk before/after, health score before/after. _simulate_health_after_rebalance(d, sizing_results) helper used for before/after comparison. Portfolio tab below decision_center.

features.name: Dashboard Layout Reorganization
features.notes: Rebuild Gradio layout: Dashboard tab = EXACTLY 5 panels (health_hero → todays_actions → ai_recommendation → risk_panel → whats_changed). Signals tab = add mkt_intel + watchlist after existing timeline/signals. Portfolio tab = add committee + decision_center + rebalance before positions. Update all timer.tick() calls to include new outputs.

features.name: Consistency Checks Pass
features.notes: All render_* functions pass: (1) section titles ≤4 words, (2) only design system hex colors, (3) only 36/20/15/11px font sizes, (4) _symbol() for all ticker symbols, (5) _confidence_bar() for all confidence displays. Add dead code comments to render_portfolio_actions/sell_analysis/position_sizing_panel (called internally by decision_center). Add superseded comment to render_dashboard_hero.

features.name: Dashboard App.py Modular Refactor
features.notes: Split 3979-line dashboard/app.py into focused modules: design_system.py (constants+helpers), data.py (cache+DB layer), charts.py (Plotly chart functions), components/ (12 component files grouped by domain). App.py becomes 300-500 line wiring-only file. Zero logic changes â€” pure file split.

features.name: Dashboard View Model Pattern
features.notes: Separate business logic from rendering. Created viewmodels.py (pure Python dataclasses, no HTML), builders.py (8 builder functions), refactored 6 component files (portfolio, overview, actions, decision, rebalance, ai_panel). design_system.py split: CSS/HTML extracted to layout.py (338 lines, under 500). 20 viewmodel tests pass. Zero UI changes.

features.name: Critical Function Test Coverage
features.notes: Comprehensive tests for the three critical recommendation engine functions (get_portfolio_action, get_sell_analysis, get_portfolio_health). Created tests/fixtures.py with 10 portfolio scenarios (healthy, oversized, all_cash, all_invested, high_vix, single_stock, large_gain, large_loss, high_concentration, tiny). 77 tests: structural, signal, cross-consistency, and parametrized crash-safety. Fixed 4 bugs found by tests: get_sell_analysis underscored extreme concentration (now 60pts for >50% position), catastrophic losses (now 45pts for <-40%), large profits (now 30pts for >100% gain); _max_sector_conc now uses pv as denominator so cash dilutes concentration; latest_buy_signal used as fallback when trades_df is None; get_portfolio_health momentum uses latest_buy_signal fallback. Also fixed log_exception call signature bug (was 2-arg, now correct 3-arg) in 5 places.

features.name: Analytics Exception Hardening
features.notes: Fixed all swallowed exceptions in analytics_service.py and analytics_repository.py. save_daily_snapshot() now logs at WARNING when health_score=0, INFO on success, and uses log_exception() on any failure. Added try/except+log_exception to get_sharpe_ratio() and get_max_drawdown(). Added check_health() method. Upgraded all 5 CLASS B handlers in analytics_repository.py to log_exception(). Wired check_health() into run_loop() startup and upgraded end_of_day call site in bot/main.py. Added test_analytics_service_check_health to test_duckdb_integration.py and test_analytics_check_health to ui_tester.py GROUP 8.

features.name: Rebalance Suggestions
features.notes: P1: render_rebalance_suggestions() — full rebalance summary card: reduce/exit/add rows, net cash change, positions before/after, sector risk delta. Portfolio tab below position sizing.

features.name: Paper Trading Scorecard
features.notes: P1: render_paper_trading_scorecard() — return vs SPY/QQQ (yfinance), Sharpe, max DD, win rate, AI-follow rate. Models tab under Performance Tracking.

features.name: 5-min Trading Loop
features.notes: GitHub Actions cron; market-hours + holiday detection; HALT_TRADING emergency override

features.name: Pre-market Screener
features.notes: universe_today.json → screener_log; RL agent ranks candidates; separate premarket job

features.name: Technical Feature Engineering
features.notes: compute_features(): ATR, RSI, EMA, volume ratio, 15-min RSI via 5-min bars

features.name: Market Regime Classifier
features.notes: TRENDING / RANGING / BEARISH / VOLATILE labels; entry gated to TRENDING + RANGING only

features.name: XGBoost Signal Model
features.notes: Probability-calibrated; SHAP feature_drivers stored per trade; pre-market retrain

features.name: LSTM Signal Model
features.notes: 30-bar rolling window; loaded once in run_loop to avoid per-cycle startup cost

features.name: Sentiment Pipeline
features.notes: FinBERT premarket batch (NewsAPI) + Reddit/WSB dynamic weighting (log1p mentions, 5-min cache)

features.name: FRED Macro Signals
features.notes: VIX >= 40 halts all buys; macro score + size cap; 4-hour DB-backed cache

features.name: Ensemble Signal
features.notes: Weighted: XGB + LSTM + sentiment + macro → STRONG_BUY / BUY / HOLD / SELL

features.name: Entry Gate Suite
features.notes: 10 gates: VIX halt / regime / volume / 15-min RSI / RS / open-order / earnings / correlation / wash-sale / stop re-entry + Kelly sizing

features.name: Exit Logic Suite
features.notes: Gap-down floor → take-profit (3xATR, 6-8%) → ATR stop → trailing stop → drift trim → time-exit → ensemble sell

features.name: Risk Manager
features.notes: Daily 2% / weekly 5% loss limits; PDT 3-trade gate; drawdown circuit-breaker; portfolio-high tracking

features.name: Alpaca Execution Engine
features.notes: Limit buy + fill confirmation; limit/market sell with stop-timeout escalation; slippage logging

features.name: SQLite Data Layer
features.notes: 8 tables: trades, position_state, risk_state, earnings_cache, macro_cache, portfolio_snapshots, signal_log, screener_log

features.name: HuggingFace DB Bridge
features.notes: sync_db.py pushes trades.db at most every 15 min; dashboard reads from HF dataset repo

features.name: Telegram Alert System
features.notes: BUY / SELL / stop-loss / risk-warning / VIX-halt / daily-summary / weekly-report alerts

features.name: Position Reconciliation
features.notes: Startup sync: removes stale DB entries, logs SELL_RECONCILE; seeds externally-opened positions

features.name: DuckDB Analytics Foundation Layer
features.notes: Columnar analytics DB alongside SQLite; price_history, portfolio_snapshots, recommendation_history tables; AnalyticsRepository + AnalyticsService; BUY signal and daily snapshot wired into bot/main.py; 6 integration tests pass

features.name: Exception Handling Hardening
features.notes: Audited all except blocks across 7 files; fixed 17 CLASS A (silent fail) patterns with logger.debug; 3 CLASS B upgraded to opt(exception=True).warning; safe_render() + timed() decorators added to error_logger.py; @safe_render applied to all 25 HTML render functions; @timed on 5 slow functions; GROUP 8 exception test in ui_tester.py; docs/exception_audit.txt created

features.name: SQLite Threading Safety
features.notes: Audited all SQLite connections (docs/sqlite_audit.txt); added get_db_conn() context manager, safe_query(), safe_execute(), _db_locks to dashboard/data.py; _init_db() enables WAL+NORMAL sync on import; _enable_wal_mode() added to bot/main.py called at startup; dashboard/components/history.py converted to get_db_conn(); tests/test_sqlite_threading.py: 5 tests all pass; ui_tester 0 FAIL 0 WARN

features.name: Recommendation History & Benchmark Comparison
features.notes: PART 1: save_recommendation() now records prev_recommendation, change_reason, price_at_recommendation via ALTER TABLE migration in schema.sql; load_recommendation_history() added to AnalyticsRepository with symbol/days/changes_only filters; render_recommendation_history() in dashboard/components/history.py; Models tab. PART 2: get_benchmark_comparison() in AnalyticsService with 1-hour module-level cache; render_benchmark_comparison() in dashboard/components/overview.py; Dashboard tab after risk panel. PART 3: 3 new DuckDB integration tests: test_recommendation_history_change_detected, test_benchmark_comparison_returns_dict, test_benchmark_spy_return_is_numeric — all pass; ui_tester 0 FAIL 0 WARN

technical_decisions.title: One Gradio app not three
technical_decisions.body: Single shared portfolio and AI committee view reduces maintenance overhead.

technical_decisions.title: Pure Python / Gradio over React
technical_decisions.body: Matches ML codebase; all UI rendered as HTML strings inside gr.HTML components.

technical_decisions.title: yfinance for historical prices (SPEC 6B/6C)
technical_decisions.body: Alpaca handles live intraday data; yfinance provides multi-year history for free.

technical_decisions.title: SQLite synced via HuggingFace dataset repo
technical_decisions.body: Simple file-based persistence without external DB. trades.db pushed after each cycle.

technical_decisions.title: Module-level _CACHE with 55-second TTL
technical_decisions.body: All render functions share one DB read per 60-second refresh to prevent N×DB calls.

technical_decisions.title: GitHub Actions cron + HF Spaces auto-deploy
technical_decisions.body: Bot runs on scheduled GH Actions workflows. Dashboard auto-deploys from main branch.

known_limitations: Day trading not implemented — intentional to avoid the PDT rule
Paper trading only — real money deployment gated behind win rate ≥ 60% sustained over 90 days
SQLite not suitable for high-frequency writes; intentional for swing-trading cadence
Dashboard read-only — no manual order entry by design (all orders through bot logic)
Historical performance shows --- until enough bot history accumulates (< 30 days live)
yfinance slow on first load with 10+ open positions (cached for 1 hour after)
Dashboard refreshes every 60 seconds (Gradio Timer) — real-time would require websockets
DuckDB analytics not yet surfaced in scorecard panel (reads SQLite directly instead)
known_limitations_intentional: Day trading not implemented — intentional to avoid the PDT rule
Paper trading only — real money deployment gated behind win rate ≥ 60% sustained over 90 days
SQLite not suitable for high-frequency writes; intentional for swing-trading cadence
Dashboard read-only — no manual order entry by design (all orders through bot logic)

yfinance slow on first load with 10+ open positions (cached for 1 hour after)
Dashboard refreshes every 60 seconds (Gradio Timer) — real-time would require websockets
DuckDB analytics not yet surfaced in scorecard panel (reads SQLite directly instead)
